ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution responsible for the model */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication information for the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the climate model (e.g., GCM, RCM) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "model_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate projection */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model producing the projection */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario for the projection (e.g., 1% increase, abrupt changes, policy control) */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Climate variable being projected (e.g., temperature, sea level) */,
  "projection_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the projection */,
  "projection_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the projection */,
  "projection_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the projection */,
  "projection_source" TEXT /* Source of the projection data */,
  "projection_status" TEXT /* Status of the projection (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_scenario FOREIGN KEY ("scenario") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_variable FOREIGN KEY ("variable") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mld_values" (
  "mld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MLD value */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate projection */,
  "projection_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the MLD value is calculated */,
  "projection_month" INTEGER /* Month for which the MLD value is calculated */,
  "projection_day" INTEGER /* Day for which the MLD value is calculated */,
  "mld_value" REAL /* MLD value */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of MLD values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mld_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mld_values_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES projections ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mld_values_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mld_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario for the ranking */,
  "rank_1pct" INTEGER /* Ranking of the model for 1% increase scenario */,
  "rank_abrupt" INTEGER /* Ranking of the model for abrupt changes scenario */,
  "rank_picontrol" INTEGER /* Ranking of the model for policy control scenario */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ranking criteria */,
  "rank_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "scenario_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "scenario_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of the scenario (e.g., historical, future) */,
  "scenario_source" TEXT /* Source of the scenario data */,
  "scenario_status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the variable */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable */,
  "variable_source" TEXT /* Source of the variable data */,
  "variable_status" TEXT /* Status of the variable (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate projection being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the projection */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the projection was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES projections ("projection_id")
)
